---
name: mcp-text
text_config:
  model_name: test-model
  tools:
    - mcp://server-1/web-search
    - sum
input_schema:
  type: object
  properties:
    userMessage:
      type: string
  required:
    - userMessage
---

<System>
You are a helpful assistant.
</System>

<User>
{props.userMessage}
</User>

<Assistant>
Working on it.
</Assistant>
